commands.author: wangmiao0668000666
commands.command:
re-review

- added a real websocket handshake reproduction script (scripts/repro/issue-90654-gateway-handshake-trim-crash-websocket.mts) that starts startgatewayserver, loads malformed pairing state with non-string roles/scopes, and completes a connect handshake.
- the repro revealed two additional .trim() crash sites in src/infra/device-pairing.ts (mergeroles/mergescopes) that are now guarded with typeof === "string" checks, plus a regression test.
- updated pr body with the terminal output and verification commands.

- The repro revealed two additional .trim() crash sites in src/infra/device-pairing.ts (mergeRoles/mergeScopes) that are now guarded with typeof === "string" checks, plus a regression test.
- Updated PR body with the terminal output and verification commands.
